When the quality of the products changes, the QuID is updated, and a row is added to this table.  The 
third column specifies which sections or sub -sections have been updated.  The fourth column should 
mention the version of the product to which the change applies.

catalog_entry.summary: This document is a Quality Information Document (QUID) for the Baltic Sea Analysis and Forecast Biogeochemistry product, detailing its production system description, validation framework updates, and changes over various issues from December 2014 to September 2024.

product_line.name: Baltic Sea Analysis and Forecast Biogeochemistry
